name: Fortune Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease two cookie sheets.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy.
4. Gradually add sugar, water, melted butter, and vanilla to the egg whites, mixing well.
5. Add flour and salt; stir until just combined.
6. Using the back of a spoon, spread teaspoonfuls of batter onto the greased cookie sheets to form thin, almost transparent cookies.
7. Bake for 5-7 minutes or until lightly browned at the edges.
8. Remove cookie sheets from the oven.
9. Carefully remove one cookie and place it aside.
10. Return the empty sheet to the oven to prevent other cookies from sticking.
11. Place a fortune in the center of each remaining cookie.
12. Fold the cookies in half and bend slightly in the middle to form a half-moon shape.
13. Repeat with the remaining cookies.
This recipe makes about 24 fortune cookies.
